title.rendered: Transfering Money to Mexico  – The Story of Santiago and Sofia

content.rendered:
Travel FX customers use our international money transfer services for all sorts of different reasons. It was great to catch up with restaurant owners Santiago and Sofia to find out how our currency exchange services have benefited them and their families.

Ten years ago Santiago came to the UK to bring us a taste of Mexico. He opened a restaurant in Manchester, which he and Sofia have grown into a hugely successful business. When Santiago arrived here, it was just him, his wife and his baby son. He had left behind his mum, dad and two brothers, his wife had left behind her family, and they both had a large wider families in Mexico.

In the early days, Santiago and Sofia worked tirelessly to get the restaurant up and running and had very little time to get back to Mexico. Over the years, they have created a trusted team in the restaurant, so they are able to hand over the reins to their manager José and travel back to Mexico on a more regular basis. Santiago uses Travel FX to transfer the money he needs for his trips to his bank account in Mexico.

“When I first came to  the UK it was just me, my wife and our first son. We were working very hard to set up the business so we had very little free time to go back and see the family. Now we have three children. It is really important to us that our children get to know their grandparents, aunties, uncles and cousins, so travelling to Mexico has become much more of a priority. The restaurant is now very well established and we love living in the UK, so we wouldn’t want to change any of that. But now we have the opportunity to travel back to Mexico regularly.”

 

“I have a bank account in Mexico, so I send money from my UK account to my Mexican bank using Travel FX. It is perfect for us. There are no fees, the rates are good, the service is really quick and we have money to spend on our holidays from the moment we land.”

“I also use Travel FX to send money back to my parents every so often. They are retired now and it is nice to send them money transfers to help with day to day expenses or to pay for a special occasion. The Travel FX system is so easy to use that I can make the transfer in a few minues and it usually arrives the next working ayand because it goes directly into their bank account, they can’t argue with me about sending it. They are very proud, but I want to make sure they are looked after and that I can share some of our restaurant success with them,” he added.

Santiago and Sofia exchange their pounds for the Mexican Peso, but Travel FX can send money to the bank accounts of friends and family all over the world. You can transfer between £50 and £100,000 and there are no added charges. If you want to transfer larger amounts, then you can call our specialist team and we can make arrangements for you.

The Travel FX services usually delivers the money to selected accounts in one working day, which is much faster than transferring through banks, which can take a few days, incur charges and give you a poor rate.

If you need to transfer money to mexico, start here:https://www.travelfx.co.uk/transfer-pounds-to-mexican-peso

Find out more about our international money transfers to arount the world, visit: https://www.travelfx.co.uk/international-transfers.

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
